name: Cannoli (Mario)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sheep's milk ricotta, may sub. cow's milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together dry ingredients and cut in butter with 2 knives until crumbly.
2. Add Marsala wine and shape dough into a ball. Wrap in plastic and refrigerate.
3. Heat 2 quarts canola oil in a 3-quart pot to 350 degrees.
4. In a mixing bowl, stir together ricotta, sugar, vanilla extract, orange zest, and chocolate chips until well mixed. Spoon into a pastry bag with an open tip and place in refrigerator.
5. Remove dough from refrigerator and divide into 4 pieces. Roll one piece onto a flat surface with a rolling pin until 1/16 inch thick.
6. Cut into 4-inch circles. Using a rolling pin, elongate circles into ovals.
7. Wrap ovals lengthwise around metal forms and seal edge with egg whites.
8. Flare ends open with fingers and place in hot oil. Fry until golden brown, about 2 to 3 minutes. Remove and allow to drain on paper towels.
9. When cool enough to touch, twist molds away from shells. Shells may be made up to 1 day in advance and stored unfilled and uncovered.
10. When ready to eat, stuff cannoli with ricotta cream, dust with powdered sugar, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
